name: p1_ops_str_bool
drl:
rule "seq" when $x : S(s == "alpha") then insert(new Hit("seq", $x.getS())); end
rule "sne" when $x : S(s != "beta") then insert(new Hit("sne", $x.getS())); end
rule "sempty" when $x : S(s == "") then insert(new Hit("sempty", $x.getS())); end
rule "bt" when $x : S(ok == true) then insert(new Hit("bt", $x.getS())); end
rule "bf" when $x : S(ok != true) then insert(new Hit("bf", $x.getS())); end
